smoke.detail: Box smoke (linux-64; py3.11, pytorch 2.1.2 cuda120 build [torch.cuda.is_available()==True], pytorch_geometric, openbabel 3.1.1, rdkit) on the FTO-43 fixture. DISCRIMINATIVE mode returned the three LANDMINE space-keyed regression pIC50 floats (hERG pIC50=4.502, NaV1.5 pIC50=5.563, CaV1.2 pIC50=7.369), uncertainty=null (no native signal), raw carries the cutoff-class context (pIC50>=5.0) explicitly marked NOT a probability (F-1 deferred to t52). GENERATIVE mode refused cleanly: exit 2, stderr 'GATED: needs Kunhuan binding/selectivity interface (not built)' + TODO, no output file written. --gpu N honored (CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES pinned before torch import; verified on GPU 1). Verified from the pushed branch checked out in the box repo: (1) `pixi install` off the committed lock, exit 0; (2) `pixi run pytest tests/test_model_cardiogenai.py -m model -q` in the core env -> 2 passed (73s), both records validated against core.schemas.OutputRecord.

note: CardioGenAI discriminative cardiac secondary (in_bulk_loop=False): drives src.Discriminator.predict_cardiac_ion_channel_activity (regression) and emits the three space-keyed labels 'hERG pIC50'/'NaV1.5 pIC50'/'CaV1.2 pIC50' (LANDMINE: keys contain a literal space). Raw pIC50 only; pIC50 -> P(block) is F-1, DEFERRED to the hERG gate (t52). Generative path is scaffold-only, GATED on Kunhuan FTO-binding + FTO-vs-ALKBH5 selectivity (interface not built) -> stub refuses, never emits a candidate. Upstream src vendored unmodified; .pt weights (from the upstream GitHub repo) + the 746M prepared_transformer_data.csv (upstream Google Drive, needed even for inference to build the transformer vocab) fetched on the box, gitignored. Access CODE-PKG, license MIT.
